name: @loopworx/forge
description: AI-driven software delivery orchestrator that coordinates seven specialized AI agents through a lean delivery pipeline

scripts.build: bun build src/bridge/pi-bridge.ts --outfile dist/pi-bridge.js --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external @earendil-works/pi-tui --external typebox --external 'node:*' && bun build src/bridge/forge-bridge.ts --outfile dist/forge-bridge.js --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external @earendil-works/pi-tui --external typebox --external 'node:*'
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
